title: SMS to boards
excerpt: Hi, do you guys know any SMS Items app or third-party integrations that allows you to create new items from sms text messages in  monday.com boards but that app must support Georgian numbers (+995)

posts.author: lizi (lizi)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, do you guys know any SMS Items app or third-party integrations that allows you to create new items from sms text messages in monday.com boards but that app must support Georgian numbers (+995)

posts.author: Bemidex (Alek)
posts.cookedHtml: I trigger an automation using a simple HTTP webhook and set up a keyword in the message to map it to a board item. Makes it way easier to sort incoming SMS.

posts.author: brahosatad1974 (Brooke)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve connected text messaging to a board by using an email-to-board setup. The SMS sends to a Gmail that automatically forwards to the board’s email address. It’s not super fast, but it works well enough for our needs. I made sure the email format from the SMS stays consistent so the right fields get filled in. Took a bit of trial and error, but it’s reliable now.
